Notes: Button that opens the new mod window

English: Select an existing CatalogModProject asset, or click "Create New..." to start a new mod.\n\nThis asset is the source-of-truth for mod identity, versioning, icon, and export settings.
Translation: Choose an existing cargo charter, or click "Commission New..." to begin a new mod.\n\nThis charter governs the cargo's identity, version, icon, and export orders.
Notes: Shown when no project is selected
